headline: DGRO’s December Rebalance Could Reshape Healthcare Exposure: Here’s What to Watch
summary: DGRO's next index rebalance could quietly shift millions of dollars across healthcare and financials, and one overlooked holding sits at the center of the trade. Here is why the December reconstitution deserves more attention than investors are giving it.

headline: This Cashier Shows That Some Companies Still Reward Dedication. He Earns $33 an Hour and Is Now a Millionaire
summary: For many workers, the idea of becoming a millionaire while spending an entire career as a cashier sounds impossible. But one longtime Costco (NASDAQ:COST) employee shows that, under the right circumstances, decades of steady work, good benefits and consistent investing...
